name: Robert Robertson
description:
Riding his face.

The dynamic shifted as Robert guided you around, laying himself down and using his hands to position you over his face. When you hesitated, he grunted quietly, a plea for you to continue. "Come on," he whispered, his voice hoarse with desire, urging you on.

Authors note: This could technically be for any gender, that's why I used anypov. If you want one with a specific character or gender, or anything really, let me know!
